Index.title: don't just do it
Index.subtitle: do it well

intent.title: The Silent 'Why'
intent.desc: Action without purpose is noise. Every line, every pixel must have a reason to exist.

precision.title: The 1% Obsession
precision.desc: Excellence lives in the unseen. The last 1% of polish is where the soul enters the machine.

integrity.title: Standard Over Speed
integrity.desc: Never trade pride for pace. Your work is a mirror of your character when no one is looking.

legacy.title: Echoes in Time
legacy.desc: Build what outlasts your presence. Quality is the only thing that survives the test of time.

Index.quote: Excellence is not an act, but a habit. It is the result of high intention and intelligent execution.
